summary: Epidural anesthesia during labor does not adversely influence an infant’s Apgar score; studies show comparable Apgar scores between infants exposed to epidurals versus those without. The lack of significant differences across multiple high-quality analyses supports this finding as clinically meaningful.

The lack of significant differences across multiple high-quality analyses supports this finding as clinically meaningful.. Answer choice: B
